members.name: AddException
members.summary: Adds a collision exception so the shape does not report collisions with the specified node.

members.name: AddExceptionRid
members.summary: Adds a collision exception so the shape does not report collisions with the specified [RID].

members.name: ClearExceptions
members.summary: Removes all collision exceptions for this shape.

members.name: ForceShapecastUpdate
members.summary: Updates the collision information for the shape immediately, without waiting for the next [code]_physics_process[/code] call. Use this method, for example, when the shape or its parent has changed state. [b]Note:[/b] Setting [member enabled] to [code]true[/code] is not required for this to work.

members.name: GetClosestCollisionSafeFraction
members.summary: Returns the fraction from this cast's origin to its [member target_position] of how far the shape can move without triggering a collision, as a value between [code]0.0[/code] and [code]1.0[/code].

members.name: GetClosestCollisionUnsafeFraction
members.summary: Returns the fraction from this cast's origin to its [member target_position] of how far the shape must move to trigger a collision, as a value between [code]0.0[/code] and [code]1.0[/code]. In ideal conditions this would be the same as [method get_closest_collision_safe_fraction], however shape casting is calculated in discrete steps, so the precise point of collision can occur between two calculated positions.

members.name: GetCollider
members.summary: Returns the collided [Object] of one of the multiple collisions at [param index], or [code]null[/code] if no object is intersecting the shape (i.e. [method is_colliding] returns [code]false[/code]).

members.name: GetColliderRid
members.summary: Returns the [RID] of the collided object of one of the multiple collisions at [param index].

members.name: GetColliderShape
members.summary: Returns the shape ID of the colliding shape of one of the multiple collisions at [param index], or [code]0[/code] if no object is intersecting the shape (i.e. [method is_colliding] returns [code]false[/code]).

members.name: GetCollisionCount
members.summary: The number of collisions detected at the point of impact. Use this to iterate over multiple collisions as provided by [method get_collider], [method get_collider_shape], [method get_collision_point], and [method get_collision_normal] methods.

members.name: GetCollisionMaskValue
members.summary: Returns whether or not the specified layer of the [member collision_mask] is enabled, given a [param layer_number] between 1 and 32.

members.name: GetCollisionNormal
members.summary: Returns the normal of one of the multiple collisions at [param index] of the intersecting object.

members.name: GetCollisionPoint
members.summary: Returns the collision point of one of the multiple collisions at [param index] where the shape intersects the colliding object. [b]Note:[/b] This point is in the [b]global[/b] coordinate system.

members.name: IsColliding
members.summary: Returns whether any object is intersecting with the shape's vector (considering the vector length).

members.name: RemoveException
members.summary: Removes a collision exception so the shape does report collisions with the specified node.

members.name: RemoveExceptionRid
members.summary: Removes a collision exception so the shape does report collisions with the specified [RID].

members.name: ResourceChanged
members.summary: This method does nothing.

members.name: SetCollisionMaskValue
members.signature: public void SetCollisionMaskValue(int layerNumber, bool value)
members.summary: Based on [param value], enables or disables the specified layer in the [member collision_mask], given a [param layer_number] between 1 and 32.

members.name: CollideWithAreas
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], collisions with [Area3D]s will be reported.

members.name: CollideWithBodies
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], collisions with [PhysicsBody3D]s will be reported.

members.name: CollisionMask
members.summary: The shape's collision mask. Only objects in at least one collision layer enabled in the mask will be detected. See [url=$DOCS_URL/tutorials/physics/physics_introduction.html#collision-layers-and-masks]Collision layers and masks[/url] in the documentation for more information.

members.name: CollisionResult
members.summary: Returns the complete collision information from the collision sweep. The data returned is the same as in the [method PhysicsDirectSpaceState3D.get_rest_info] method.

members.name: DebugShapeCustomColor
members.summary: The custom color to use to draw the shape in the editor and at run-time if [b]Visible Collision Shapes[/b] is enabled in the [b]Debug[/b] menu. This color will be highlighted at run-time if the [ShapeCast3D] is colliding with something. If set to [code]Color(0.0, 0.0, 0.0)[/code] (by default), the color set in [member ProjectSettings.debug/shapes/collision/shape_color] is used.

members.name: Enabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], collisions will be reported.

members.name: ExcludeParent
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the parent node will be excluded from collision detection.

members.name: Margin
members.summary: The collision margin for the shape. A larger margin helps detecting collisions more consistently, at the cost of precision.

members.name: MaxResults
members.summary: The number of intersections can be limited with this parameter, to reduce the processing time.

members.name: Shape
members.summary: The shape to be used for collision queries.

members.name: TargetPosition
members.summary: The shape's destination point, relative to this node's [member Node3D.position].
